prompt: Create an Oracle Fusion SQL query to extract AP invoice details with Business Unit, Invoice Number, Invoice Date, Supplier Name, Supplier Number, Invoice Amount, Invoice Currency, Invoice Status, Accounting Date. Filter Invoice Date between :P_FROM_DATE and :P_TO_DATE and order by Invoice Date.
sql:
SELECT
  bu.BU_NAME AS BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME,
  ai.INVOICE_NUM AS INVOICE_NUMBER,
  ai.INVOICE_DATE AS INVOICE_DATE,
  COALESCE(ps.DF_COMPANY_NAME, ps.DF_LEGAL_NAME, ps.TAX_REPORTING_NAME) AS SUPPLIER_NAME,
  ps.SEGMENT1 AS SUPPLIER_NUMBER,
  ai.INVOICE_AMOUNT AS INVOICE_AMOUNT,
  ai.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE AS INVOICE_CURRENCY,
  ai.APPROVAL_STATUS AS INVOICE_STATUS,
  ai.GL_DATE AS ACCOUNTING_DATE
FROM AP_INVOICES_ALL ai
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIERS ps
  ON ai.VENDOR_ID = ps.VENDOR_ID
JOIN FUN_ALL_BUSINESS_UNITS_V bu
  ON ai.ORG_ID = bu.BU_ID
WHERE ai.INVOICE_DATE BETWEEN :P_FROM_DATE AND :P_TO_DATE
ORDER BY ai.INVOICE_DATE;

prompt: Create an Oracle Fusion SQL query to extract AP invoice distribution details with Invoice Number, Supplier Name, Distribution Line Number, Distribution Amount, Natural Account Segment, Cost Center, Liability Account. Display only invoices that are Validated and Accounted.
sql:
SELECT
  ai.INVOICE_NUM AS INVOICE_NUMBER,
  COALESCE(ps.DF_COMPANY_NAME, ps.DF_LEGAL_NAME, ps.TAX_REPORTING_NAME) AS SUPPLIER_NAME,
  aid.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER AS DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER,
  aid.AMOUNT AS DISTRIBUTION_AMOUNT,
  gcc_dist.SEGMENT4 AS NATURAL_ACCOUNT_SEGMENT,
  gcc_dist.SEGMENT5 AS COST_CENTER,
  gcc_liab.CONCATENATED_SEGMENTS AS LIABILITY_ACCOUNT
FROM AP_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL aid
JOIN AP_INVOICES_ALL ai
  ON aid.INVOICE_ID = ai.INVOICE_ID
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIERS ps
  ON ai.VENDOR_ID = ps.VENDOR_ID
JOIN GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS gcc_dist
  ON aid.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID = gcc_dist.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
JOIN GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS gcc_liab
  ON ai.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID = gcc_liab.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
WHERE ai.APPROVAL_STATUS IN ('APPROVED', 'VALIDATED')
  AND aid.POSTED_FLAG = 'Y';

prompt: Create an Oracle Fusion SQL query to extract AP payments report with Supplier Name, Invoice Number, Payment Number, Payment Date, Payment Method, Paid Amount, Bank Account Name. Filter Payment Date = :P_PAYMENT_DATE.
sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(ps.DF_COMPANY_NAME, ps.DF_LEGAL_NAME, ps.TAX_REPORTING_NAME) AS SUPPLIER_NAME,
  ai.INVOICE_NUM AS INVOICE_NUMBER,
  ac.CHECK_NUMBER AS PAYMENT_NUMBER,
  ac.CHECK_DATE AS PAYMENT_DATE,
  ac.PAYMENT_METHOD_LOOKUP_CODE AS PAYMENT_METHOD,
  aip.AMOUNT AS PAID_AMOUNT,
  ac.BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME AS BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME
FROM AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS_ALL aip
JOIN AP_INVOICES_ALL ai
  ON aip.INVOICE_ID = ai.INVOICE_ID
JOIN AP_CHECKS_ALL ac
  ON aip.CHECK_ID = ac.CHECK_ID
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIERS ps
  ON ac.VENDOR_ID = ps.VENDOR_ID
WHERE ac.CHECK_DATE = :P_PAYMENT_DATE;

prompt: Create an Oracle Fusion SQL query to extract AR transaction report with Customer Name, Transaction Number, Transaction Date, Business Unit, Amount Due Original, Remaining Amount, Due Date, Payment Status. Show only open transactions as of :P_AS_OF_DATE and order by Transaction Date.
selected_pattern_example: Customer invoices with outstanding balances [Oraclewings Q4]

catalog_hits.title: Customer invoices with outstanding balances [Oraclewings Q4]
AR aging report by customer and aging bucket [Oraclewings Q14]

sql:
SELECT
  hp.PARTY_NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME,
  rct.TRX_NUMBER AS TRANSACTION_NUMBER,
  rct.TRX_DATE AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
  bu.BU_NAME AS BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME,
  aps.AMOUNT_DUE_ORIGINAL AS AMOUNT_DUE_ORIGINAL,
  aps.AMOUNT_DUE_REMAINING AS REMAINING_AMOUNT,
  aps.DUE_DATE AS DUE_DATE,
  aps.STATUS AS PAYMENT_STATUS
FROM RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL rct
JOIN AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL aps
  ON aps.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = rct.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS_ hca
  ON rct.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID = hca.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID
JOIN HZ_PARTIES hp
  ON hca.PARTY_ID = hp.PARTY_ID
JOIN FUN_ALL_BUSINESS_UNITS_V bu
  ON rct.ORG_ID = bu.BU_ID
WHERE aps.STATUS = :P_OPEN_STATUS
  AND (aps.GL_DATE_CLOSED IS NULL OR aps.GL_DATE_CLOSED > :P_AS_OF_DATE)
ORDER BY rct.TRX_DATE;

prompt: Create an Oracle Fusion SQL query to extract AR receipts and applications with Customer Name, Receipt Number, Receipt Date, Receipt Amount, Transaction Number, Applied Amount, Receipt Status. Show applied receipts and order by Receipt Date.
selected_pattern_example: Customer invoices with outstanding balances [Oraclewings Q4]

catalog_hits.title: Customer invoices with outstanding balances [Oraclewings Q4]
AR aging report by customer and aging bucket [Oraclewings Q14]

sql:
SELECT
  hp.PARTY_NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME,
  acr.RECEIPT_NUMBER AS RECEIPT_NUMBER,
  acr.RECEIPT_DATE AS RECEIPT_DATE,
  acr.AMOUNT AS RECEIPT_AMOUNT,
  rct.TRX_NUMBER AS TRANSACTION_NUMBER,
  ara.AMOUNT_APPLIED AS APPLIED_AMOUNT,
  acr.STATUS AS RECEIPT_STATUS
FROM AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL acr
JOIN AR_RECEIVABLE_APPLICATIONS_ALL ara
  ON ara.CASH_RECEIPT_ID = acr.CASH_RECEIPT_ID
JOIN RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL rct
  ON ara.APPLIED_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = rct.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS_ hca
  ON rct.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID = hca.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID
JOIN HZ_PARTIES hp
  ON hca.PARTY_ID = hp.PARTY_ID
WHERE ara.DISPLAY = 'Y'
ORDER BY acr.RECEIPT_DATE;

prompt: Create an Oracle Fusion SQL query to extract AR aging report with Customer Name, Transaction Number, Due Date, Remaining Amount, Aging Bucket as of :P_AS_OF_DATE and order by Customer Name.
selected_pattern_example: AR aging report by customer and aging bucket [Oraclewings Q14]

catalog_hits.title: AR aging report by customer and aging bucket [Oraclewings Q14]
Customer invoices with outstanding balances [Oraclewings Q4]

sql:
SELECT
  hp.PARTY_NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME,
  rct.TRX_NUMBER AS TRANSACTION_NUMBER,
  aps.DUE_DATE AS DUE_DATE,
  aps.AMOUNT_DUE_REMAINING AS REMAINING_AMOUNT,
  CASE
    WHEN aps.DUE_DATE >= :P_AS_OF_DATE THEN 'CURRENT'
    WHEN :P_AS_OF_DATE - aps.DUE_DATE BETWEEN 1 AND 30 THEN '1_30'
    WHEN :P_AS_OF_DATE - aps.DUE_DATE BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31_60'
    WHEN :P_AS_OF_DATE - aps.DUE_DATE BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN '61_90'
    ELSE 'OVER_90'
  END AS AGING_BUCKET
FROM RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL rct
JOIN AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL aps
  ON aps.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = rct.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS_ hca
  ON rct.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID = hca.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID
JOIN HZ_PARTIES hp
  ON hca.PARTY_ID = hp.PARTY_ID
WHERE aps.STATUS = :P_OPEN_STATUS
  AND (aps.GL_DATE_CLOSED IS NULL OR aps.GL_DATE_CLOSED > :P_AS_OF_DATE)
ORDER BY hp.PARTY_NAME;

prompt: Create an Oracle Fusion SQL query to extract GL account balances with Ledger Name, Period Name, Account Combination, Period Net Dr, Period Net Cr, Ending Balance. Filter Ledger Name = :P_LEDGER_NAME and Period Name = :P_PERIOD_NAME and order by Account Combination.

catalog_hits.title: Journal entries for a specific period [Oraclewings Q5]

sql:
SELECT
  gl.NAME AS LEDGER_NAME,
  gb.PERIOD_NAME AS PERIOD_NAME,
  gcc.CONCATENATED_SEGMENTS AS ACCOUNT_COMBINATION,
  gb.PERIOD_NET_DR AS PERIOD_NET_DR,
  gb.PERIOD_NET_CR AS PERIOD_NET_CR,
  ((NVL(gb.BEGIN_BALANCE_DR, 0) - NVL(gb.BEGIN_BALANCE_CR, 0)) + (NVL(gb.PERIOD_NET_DR, 0) - NVL(gb.PERIOD_NET_CR, 0))) AS ENDING_BALANCE
FROM GL_BALANCES gb
JOIN GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS gcc
  ON gb.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = gcc.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
JOIN GL_LEDGERS gl
  ON gb.LEDGER_ID = gl.LEDGER_ID
WHERE gl.NAME = :P_LEDGER_NAME
  AND gb.PERIOD_NAME = :P_PERIOD_NAME
ORDER BY gcc.CONCATENATED_SEGMENTS;

prompt: Create an Oracle Fusion SQL query to extract GL journal details with Ledger Name, Journal Name, Period Name, Journal Source, Journal Category, Journal Status, Journal Line Number, Account Combination, Debit Amount, Credit Amount. Show posted journals for Ledger Name = :P_LEDGER_NAME and Period Name = :P_PERIOD_NAME and order by Journal Name.
selected_pattern_example: Journal entries for a specific period [Oraclewings Q5]

catalog_hits.title: Journal entries for a specific period [Oraclewings Q5]

sql:
SELECT
  gl.NAME AS LEDGER_NAME,
  gjh.NAME AS JOURNAL_NAME,
  gjh.PERIOD_NAME AS PERIOD_NAME,
  gjh.JE_SOURCE AS JOURNAL_SOURCE,
  gjh.JE_CATEGORY AS JOURNAL_CATEGORY,
  gjh.STATUS AS JOURNAL_STATUS,
  gjl.JE_LINE_NUM AS LINE_NUMBER,
  gcc.CONCATENATED_SEGMENTS AS ACCOUNT_COMBINATION,
  gjl.ENTERED_DR AS DEBIT_AMOUNT,
  gjl.ENTERED_CR AS CREDIT_AMOUNT
FROM GL_JE_HEADERS gjh
JOIN GL_JE_LINES gjl
  ON gjl.JE_HEADER_ID = gjh.JE_HEADER_ID
JOIN GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS gcc
  ON gjl.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = gcc.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
JOIN GL_LEDGERS gl
  ON gjh.LEDGER_ID = gl.LEDGER_ID
WHERE gjh.STATUS = 'P'
  AND gl.NAME = :P_LEDGER_NAME
  AND gjh.PERIOD_NAME = :P_PERIOD_NAME
ORDER BY gjh.NAME;

prompt: Create an Oracle Fusion SQL query to extract Purchase Order details with PO Number, PO Date, PO Status, Supplier Name, Supplier Number, Site Code, Line Number, Item Description, Ordered Quantity, Unit Price and order by PO Number.
sql:
SELECT
  ph.SEGMENT1 AS PO_NUMBER,
  ph.CREATION_DATE AS PO_DATE,
  ph.DOCUMENT_STATUS AS PO_STATUS,
  COALESCE(ps.DF_COMPANY_NAME, ps.DF_LEGAL_NAME, ps.TAX_REPORTING_NAME) AS SUPPLIER_NAME,
  ps.SEGMENT1 AS SUPPLIER_NUMBER,
  pssm.VENDOR_SITE_CODE AS SITE_CODE,
  pl.LINE_NUM AS LINE_NUMBER,
  pl.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
  pl.QUANTITY AS ORDERED_QUANTITY,
  pl.UNIT_PRICE AS UNIT_PRICE
FROM PO_HEADERS_ALL ph
JOIN PO_LINES_ALL pl
  ON pl.PO_HEADER_ID = ph.PO_HEADER_ID
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIERS ps
  ON ph.VENDOR_ID = ps.VENDOR_ID
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIER_SITES_ALL_M pssm
  ON ph.VENDOR_SITE_ID = pssm.VENDOR_SITE_ID
ORDER BY ph.SEGMENT1;

prompt: Create an Oracle Fusion SQL query to extract PO receiving and invoicing match details with PO Number, Supplier Name, Line Number, Ordered Quantity, Received Quantity, Billed Quantity, Receipt Date and order by PO Number.
sql:
SELECT
  ph.SEGMENT1 AS PO_NUMBER,
  COALESCE(ps.DF_COMPANY_NAME, ps.DF_LEGAL_NAME, ps.TAX_REPORTING_NAME) AS SUPPLIER_NAME,
  pl.LINE_NUM AS LINE_NUMBER,
  pl.QUANTITY AS ORDERED_QUANTITY,
  pll.QUANTITY_RECEIVED AS RECEIVED_QUANTITY,
  pll.QUANTITY_BILLED AS BILLED_QUANTITY,
  rcv.TRANSACTION_DATE AS RECEIPT_DATE
FROM PO_HEADERS_ALL ph
JOIN PO_LINES_ALL pl
  ON pl.PO_HEADER_ID = ph.PO_HEADER_ID
JOIN PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL pll
  ON pll.PO_LINE_ID = pl.PO_LINE_ID
JOIN RCV_TRANSACTIONS rcv
  ON rcv.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID = pll.LINE_LOCATION_ID
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIERS ps
  ON ph.VENDOR_ID = ps.VENDOR_ID
ORDER BY ph.SEGMENT1;

prompt: Generate Oracle Fusion Payables SQL for an invoice detail report. Include: - Business Unit - Supplier Name - Supplier Number - Invoice Number - Invoice Date - Invoice Amount - Invoice Currency - Invoice Status - Accounting Date. Use Invoice Date BETWEEN :P_FROM_DATE AND :P_TO_DATE. Sort by Invoice Date.
sql:
SELECT
  bu.BU_NAME AS BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME,
  ai.INVOICE_NUM AS INVOICE_NUMBER,
  ai.INVOICE_DATE AS INVOICE_DATE,
  COALESCE(ps.DF_COMPANY_NAME, ps.DF_LEGAL_NAME, ps.TAX_REPORTING_NAME) AS SUPPLIER_NAME,
  ps.SEGMENT1 AS SUPPLIER_NUMBER,
  ai.INVOICE_AMOUNT AS INVOICE_AMOUNT,
  ai.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE AS INVOICE_CURRENCY,
  ai.APPROVAL_STATUS AS INVOICE_STATUS,
  ai.GL_DATE AS ACCOUNTING_DATE
FROM AP_INVOICES_ALL ai
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIERS ps
  ON ai.VENDOR_ID = ps.VENDOR_ID
JOIN FUN_ALL_BUSINESS_UNITS_V bu
  ON ai.ORG_ID = bu.BU_ID
WHERE ai.INVOICE_DATE BETWEEN :P_FROM_DATE AND :P_TO_DATE
ORDER BY ai.INVOICE_DATE;

prompt: Write Oracle Fusion Purchasing SQL for a purchase order detail report with Supplier Name, Supplier Number, Site Code, PO Number, PO Date, PO Status, Line Number, Item Description, Ordered Quantity, Unit Price. Order by PO Number.

SELECT

ORDER BY ph.SEGMENT1;

prompt: Build Oracle Fusion Payables SQL for a vendor invoice header listing with BU, vendor name, vendor number, invoice num, invoice date, invoice total, transaction currency, approval status, and accounting date. Keep invoice date between :P_FROM_DATE and :P_TO_DATE and sort by invoice date.
sql:
SELECT
  ai.INVOICE_NUM AS INVOICE_NUMBER,
  ai.INVOICE_DATE AS INVOICE_DATE,
  COALESCE(ps.DF_COMPANY_NAME, ps.DF_LEGAL_NAME, ps.TAX_REPORTING_NAME) AS SUPPLIER_NAME,
  ps.SEGMENT1 AS SUPPLIER_NUMBER,
  ai.INVOICE_AMOUNT AS INVOICE_AMOUNT,
  ai.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE AS INVOICE_CURRENCY,
  ai.GL_DATE AS ACCOUNTING_DATE
FROM AP_INVOICES_ALL ai
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIERS ps
  ON ai.VENDOR_ID = ps.VENDOR_ID
WHERE ai.INVOICE_DATE BETWEEN :P_FROM_DATE AND :P_TO_DATE
ORDER BY ai.INVOICE_DATE;

  ps.SEGMENT1 AS SUPPLIER_NUMBER,

prompt: Generate Oracle Fusion SQL for a 3-way match receiving report with purchase order number, supplier name, line number, ordered quantity, received quantity, billed quantity, and receipt date. Order by purchase order number.
sql:
SELECT
  ph.SEGMENT1 AS PO_NUMBER,
  COALESCE(ps.DF_COMPANY_NAME, ps.DF_LEGAL_NAME, ps.TAX_REPORTING_NAME) AS SUPPLIER_NAME,
  pl.LINE_NUM AS LINE_NUMBER,
  pl.QUANTITY AS ORDERED_QUANTITY,
  pll.QUANTITY_RECEIVED AS RECEIVED_QUANTITY,
  pll.QUANTITY_BILLED AS BILLED_QUANTITY,
  rcv.TRANSACTION_DATE AS RECEIPT_DATE
FROM PO_HEADERS_ALL ph
JOIN PO_LINES_ALL pl
  ON pl.PO_HEADER_ID = ph.PO_HEADER_ID
JOIN PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL pll
  ON pll.PO_LINE_ID = pl.PO_LINE_ID
JOIN RCV_TRANSACTIONS rcv
  ON rcv.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID = pll.LINE_LOCATION_ID
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIERS ps
  ON ph.VENDOR_ID = ps.VENDOR_ID
ORDER BY ph.SEGMENT1;

prompt: Create Oracle Fusion AP invoice detail SQL with Business Unit, Invoice Number, Supplier Name, Invoice Amount, Invoice Currency, Invoice Status, and Accounting Date for invoices dated from :P_FROM_DATE to :P_TO_DATE. Order by Invoice Date.
sql:
SELECT
  bu.BU_NAME AS BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME,
  ai.INVOICE_NUM AS INVOICE_NUMBER,
  ai.INVOICE_DATE AS INVOICE_DATE,
  COALESCE(ps.DF_COMPANY_NAME, ps.DF_LEGAL_NAME, ps.TAX_REPORTING_NAME) AS SUPPLIER_NAME,
  ai.INVOICE_AMOUNT AS INVOICE_AMOUNT,
  ai.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE AS INVOICE_CURRENCY,
  ai.APPROVAL_STATUS AS INVOICE_STATUS,
  ai.GL_DATE AS ACCOUNTING_DATE
FROM AP_INVOICES_ALL ai
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIERS ps
  ON ai.VENDOR_ID = ps.VENDOR_ID
JOIN FUN_ALL_BUSINESS_UNITS_V bu
  ON ai.ORG_ID = bu.BU_ID
WHERE ai.INVOICE_DATE BETWEEN :P_FROM_DATE AND :P_TO_DATE
ORDER BY ai.INVOICE_DATE;

prompt: Create Oracle Fusion AR aging SQL with Customer Name, Transaction Number, Due Date, Remaining Amount, and Aging Bucket using :P_AS_OF_DATE as the as-of date. Order by Customer Name.
selected_pattern_example: AR aging report by customer and aging bucket [Oraclewings Q14]

catalog_hits.title: AR aging report by customer and aging bucket [Oraclewings Q14]
Customer invoices with outstanding balances [Oraclewings Q4]

sql:
SELECT
  hp.PARTY_NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME,
  rct.TRX_NUMBER AS TRANSACTION_NUMBER,
  aps.DUE_DATE AS DUE_DATE,
  aps.AMOUNT_DUE_REMAINING AS REMAINING_AMOUNT,
  CASE
    WHEN aps.DUE_DATE >= :P_AS_OF_DATE THEN 'CURRENT'
    WHEN :P_AS_OF_DATE - aps.DUE_DATE BETWEEN 1 AND 30 THEN '1_30'
    WHEN :P_AS_OF_DATE - aps.DUE_DATE BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31_60'
    WHEN :P_AS_OF_DATE - aps.DUE_DATE BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN '61_90'
    ELSE 'OVER_90'
  END AS AGING_BUCKET
FROM RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL rct
JOIN AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL aps
  ON aps.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = rct.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS_ hca
  ON rct.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID = hca.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID
JOIN HZ_PARTIES hp
  ON hca.PARTY_ID = hp.PARTY_ID
WHERE aps.STATUS = :P_OPEN_STATUS
  AND (aps.GL_DATE_CLOSED IS NULL OR aps.GL_DATE_CLOSED > :P_AS_OF_DATE)
ORDER BY hp.PARTY_NAME;

prompt: Generate Oracle Fusion General Ledger balance SQL with Ledger Name, Period Name, Account Combination, Period Net Dr, Period Net Cr, and Ending Balance for ledger :P_LEDGER_NAME and period :P_PERIOD_NAME. Sort by account combination.

catalog_hits.title: Journal entries for a specific period [Oraclewings Q5]

sql:
SELECT
  gl.NAME AS LEDGER_NAME,
  gb.PERIOD_NAME AS PERIOD_NAME,
  gcc.CONCATENATED_SEGMENTS AS ACCOUNT_COMBINATION,
  gb.PERIOD_NET_DR AS PERIOD_NET_DR,
  gb.PERIOD_NET_CR AS PERIOD_NET_CR,
  ((NVL(gb.BEGIN_BALANCE_DR, 0) - NVL(gb.BEGIN_BALANCE_CR, 0)) + (NVL(gb.PERIOD_NET_DR, 0) - NVL(gb.PERIOD_NET_CR, 0))) AS ENDING_BALANCE
FROM GL_BALANCES gb
JOIN GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS gcc
  ON gb.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = gcc.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
JOIN GL_LEDGERS gl
  ON gb.LEDGER_ID = gl.LEDGER_ID
WHERE gl.NAME = :P_LEDGER_NAME
  AND gb.PERIOD_NAME = :P_PERIOD_NAME
ORDER BY gcc.CONCATENATED_SEGMENTS;

prompt: Create Oracle Fusion SQL for AP payments with Supplier Name, Invoice Number, Payment Number, Payment Date, Payment Method, Paid Amount, Bank Account Name, and SWIFT Code. Filter Payment Date = :P_PAYMENT_DATE.
sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(ps.DF_COMPANY_NAME, ps.DF_LEGAL_NAME, ps.TAX_REPORTING_NAME) AS SUPPLIER_NAME,
  ai.INVOICE_NUM AS INVOICE_NUMBER,
  ac.CHECK_NUMBER AS PAYMENT_NUMBER,
  ac.CHECK_DATE AS PAYMENT_DATE,
  ac.PAYMENT_METHOD_LOOKUP_CODE AS PAYMENT_METHOD,
  aip.AMOUNT AS PAID_AMOUNT,
  ac.BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME AS BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME
FROM AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS_ALL aip
JOIN AP_INVOICES_ALL ai
  ON aip.INVOICE_ID = ai.INVOICE_ID
JOIN AP_CHECKS_ALL ac
  ON aip.CHECK_ID = ac.CHECK_ID
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIERS ps
  ON ac.VENDOR_ID = ps.VENDOR_ID
WHERE ac.CHECK_DATE = :P_PAYMENT_DATE;

prompt: Create Oracle Fusion SQL for posted GL journal details with Ledger Name, Journal Name, Journal Status, Journal Line Number, Account Combination, Debit Amount, Credit Amount, and Journal Approver User. Filter Ledger Name = :P_LEDGER_NAME and Period Name = :P_PERIOD_NAME.
selected_pattern_example: Journal entries for a specific period [Oraclewings Q5]

catalog_hits.title: Journal entries for a specific period [Oraclewings Q5]

sql:
SELECT
  gl.NAME AS LEDGER_NAME,
  gjh.NAME AS JOURNAL_NAME,
  gjh.PERIOD_NAME AS PERIOD_NAME,
  gjh.STATUS AS JOURNAL_STATUS,
  gjl.JE_LINE_NUM AS LINE_NUMBER,
  gcc.CONCATENATED_SEGMENTS AS ACCOUNT_COMBINATION,
  gjl.ENTERED_DR AS DEBIT_AMOUNT,
  gjl.ENTERED_CR AS CREDIT_AMOUNT
FROM GL_JE_HEADERS gjh
JOIN GL_JE_LINES gjl
  ON gjl.JE_HEADER_ID = gjh.JE_HEADER_ID
JOIN GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS gcc
  ON gjl.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = gcc.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
JOIN GL_LEDGERS gl
  ON gjh.LEDGER_ID = gl.LEDGER_ID
WHERE gjh.STATUS = 'P'
  AND gl.NAME = :P_LEDGER_NAME
  AND gjh.PERIOD_NAME = :P_PERIOD_NAME;

sql:
SELECT
  hp.PARTY_NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME,
  rct.TRX_NUMBER AS TRANSACTION_NUMBER,
  aps.DUE_DATE AS DUE_DATE,
  aps.AMOUNT_DUE_REMAINING AS REMAINING_AMOUNT,
  CASE
    WHEN aps.DUE_DATE >= :P_AS_OF_DATE THEN 'CURRENT'
    WHEN :P_AS_OF_DATE - aps.DUE_DATE BETWEEN 1 AND 30 THEN '1_30'
    WHEN :P_AS_OF_DATE - aps.DUE_DATE BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31_60'
    WHEN :P_AS_OF_DATE - aps.DUE_DATE BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN '61_90'
    ELSE 'OVER_90'
  END AS AGING_BUCKET
FROM RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL rct
JOIN AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL aps
  ON aps.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = rct.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS_ hca
  ON rct.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID = hca.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID
JOIN HZ_PARTIES hp
  ON hca.PARTY_ID = hp.PARTY_ID
WHERE aps.STATUS = :P_OPEN_STATUS
  AND (aps.GL_DATE_CLOSED IS NULL OR aps.GL_DATE_CLOSED > :P_AS_OF_DATE);

prompt: Create Oracle Fusion OTBI logical SQL for AP invoice reporting with Supplier Name and Invoice Number.
sql:
SELECT
  ai.INVOICE_NUM AS INVOICE_NUMBER,
  COALESCE(ps.DF_COMPANY_NAME, ps.DF_LEGAL_NAME, ps.TAX_REPORTING_NAME) AS SUPPLIER_NAME
FROM AP_INVOICES_ALL ai
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIERS ps
  ON ai.VENDOR_ID = ps.VENDOR_ID;

prompt: Create PL/SQL package code for Oracle Fusion AP payments reporting with Payment Number and Payment Date.

catalog_hits.title: AP aging report by supplier [Oraclewings Q2]

sql:
SELECT
  ac.CHECK_NUMBER AS PAYMENT_NUMBER,
  ac.CHECK_DATE AS PAYMENT_DATE
FROM AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS_ALL aip
JOIN AP_INVOICES_ALL ai
  ON aip.INVOICE_ID = ai.INVOICE_ID
JOIN AP_CHECKS_ALL ac
  ON aip.CHECK_ID = ac.CHECK_ID
JOIN POZ_SUPPLIERS ps
  ON ac.VENDOR_ID = ps.VENDOR_ID
WHERE ac.CHECK_DATE = :P_PAYMENT_DATE;
